name: ermine
description: Ermine is a structural abstraction layer — a style specification that CSS implements. A typed, composable grammar: orthogonal axes (structure, spacing, sizing, state…) compose without conflict, each owning disjoint CSS properties.
author: Jorge

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --strict --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --target es2022 --types node --allowImportingTsExtensions registry.ts lint.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
